N:=41;
X:=x^7*(x + 1)^5*y^22
        - x^6*(x + 1)^4*(10*x^3 + 4*x^2 - 3*x + 4)*y^21
        + x^5*(x + 1)^4*(45*x^5 - 15*x^4 - 15*x^3 + 27*x^2 - 22*x + 6)*y^20
        - x^4*(x + 1)^3*(120*x^8 - 30*x^7 - 135*x^6 + 55*x^5 - 105*x^4 - 67*x^3 + 20*x^2 - 34*x + 4)*y^19
        + x^3*(x + 1)^2*(210*x^11 - 90*x^10 - 495*x^9 - 95*x^8 - 405*x^7 - 450*x^6 - 30*x^5 - 128*x^4 - 18*x^3 - 16*x^2 - 25*x + 1)*y^18
        - x^3*(x + 1)*(252*x^13 - 252*x^12 - 1098*x^11 - 522*x^10 - 984*x^9 - 1173*x^8 - 30*x^7 + 89*x^6 + 411*x^5 + 156*x^4 + 55*x^3 + 267*x^2 - 54*x - 7)*y^17
        + x^3*(210*x^15 - 462*x^14 - 1554*x^13 - 678*x^12 - 1102*x^11 - 1379*x^10 + 935*x^9 + 1902*x^8 + 2922*x^7 + 1875*x^6 + 1058*x^5 + 1971*x^4 + 21*x^3 - 136*x^2 + 541*x - 63)*y^16
        - x^2*(120*x^17 - 660*x^16 - 690*x^15 + 864*x^14 - 723*x^13 + 105*x^12 + 1829*x^11 + 1783*x^10 + 3961*x^9 + 31*x^8 + 1516*x^7 + 2029*x^6 - 3627*x^5 + 868*x^4 + 628*x^3 - 1433*x^2 + 553*x - 36)*y^15
        + x*(45*x^19 - 495*x^18 + 360*x^17 + 1260*x^16 - 1335*x^15 - 84*x^14 - 1647*x^13 - 1176*x^12 + 1548*x^11 - 4746*x^10 + 2603*x^9 - 2911*x^8 - 8016*x^7 + 4958*x^6 - 3910*x^5 - 2358*x^4 + 2777*x^3 - 1837*x^2 + 297*x - 9)*y^14
        - (10*x^21 - 220*x^20 + 685*x^19 + 400*x^18 - 2140*x^17 - 1620*x^16 - 5650*x^15 - 1806*x^14 + 146*x^13 - 3917*x^12 + 7589*x^11 - 7955*x^10 - 2718*x^9 + 9710*x^8 - 11322*x^7 + 5210*x^6 + 3465*x^5 - 5327*x^4 + 3778*x^3 - 1108*x^2 + 83*x - 1)*y^13
        + (x^22 - 55*x^21 + 415*x^20 - 355*x^19 - 1887*x^18 - 2066*x^17 - 5026*x^16 + 2108*x^15 + 2730*x^14 + 4479*x^13 + 12434*x^12 - 8104*x^11 + 9137*x^10 + 5723*x^9 - 12848*x^8 + 17498*x^7 - 4945*x^6 - 3459*x^5 + 8741*x^4 - 5974*x^3 + 2508*x^2 - 345*x + 10)*y^12
        + (6*x^22 - 123*x^21 + 384*x^20 + 901*x^19 + 1090*x^18 + 1608*x^17 - 5108*x^16 - 4637*x^15 - 9615*x^14 - 8463*x^13 + 7683*x^12 - 10131*x^11 + 8423*x^10 + 6944*x^9 - 16752*x^8 + 17311*x^7 - 6395*x^6 - 4401*x^5 + 10719*x^4 - 8100*x^3 + 3942*x^2 - 855*x + 45)*y^11
        + (15*x^22 - 143*x^21 - 204*x^20 - 210*x^19 + 274*x^18 + 3833*x^17 + 2854*x^16 + 6325*x^15 - 939*x^14 - 8466*x^13 + 3*x^12 - 16906*x^11 + 1039*x^10 + 4648*x^9 - 15945*x^8 + 14209*x^7 - 6995*x^6 - 5397*x^5 + 10274*x^4 - 9285*x^3 + 4710*x^2 - 1410*x + 120)*y^10
        + (20*x^22 + 10*x^21 - 13*x^20 - 284*x^19 - 1299*x^18 - 518*x^17 - 1494*x^16 + 4970*x^15 + 6205*x^14 + 5371*x^13 + 10042*x^12 - 7130*x^11 + 573*x^10 + 1439*x^9 - 11762*x^8 + 9998*x^7 - 4855*x^6 - 4475*x^5 + 8543*x^4 - 8477*x^3 + 4536*x^2 - 1638*x + 210)*y^9
        + (30*x^20 + 167*x^19 - 130*x^18 - 72*x^17 - 2876*x^16 - 1985*x^15 - 2820*x^14 + 319*x^13 + 7873*x^12 + 1905*x^11 + 6595*x^10 + 3058*x^9 - 4722*x^8 + 5677*x^7 - 2228*x^6 - 2796*x^5 + 6220*x^4 - 5999*x^3 + 3564*x^2 - 1386*x + 252)*y^8
        + (x^23 + 3*x^22 + 8*x^21 - 9*x^20 + 25*x^19 + 8*x^18 + 617*x^17 - 34*x^16 + 246*x^15 - 2859*x^14 - 3794*x^13 - 2083*x^12 - 2805*x^11 + 3124*x^10 + 1604*x^9 + 297*x^8 + 2696*x^7 - 315*x^6 - 1672*x^5 + 3625*x^4 - 3321*x^3 + 2208*x^2 - 870*x + 210)*y^7
        + (5*x^21 + 10*x^20 + 25*x^19 - 45*x^18 + 96*x^17 + 50*x^16 + 1023*x^15 + 425*x^14 + 230*x^13 - 1256*x^12 - 3155*x^11 - 1079*x^10 - 2091*x^9 + 258*x^8 + 265*x^7 + 507*x^6 - 958*x^5 + 1589*x^4 - 1447*x^3 + 1017*x^2 - 405*x + 120)*y^6
        + (10*x^19 + 10*x^18 + 30*x^17 - 81*x^16 + 159*x^15 + 159*x^14 + 908*x^13 + 725*x^12 + 135*x^11 + 94*x^10 - 1538*x^9 - 162*x^8 - 936*x^7 + 375*x^6 - 513*x^5 + 527*x^4 - 472*x^3 + 324*x^2 - 135*x + 45)*y^5
        + (10*x^17 + 20*x^15 - 66*x^14 + 134*x^13 + 190*x^12 + 455*x^11 + 640*x^10 + 14*x^9 + 367*x^8 - 537*x^7 + 190*x^6 - 255*x^5 + 137*x^4 - 100*x^3 + 64*x^2 - 29*x + 10)*y^4
        + (5*x^15 - 5*x^14 + 10*x^13 - 25*x^12 + 50*x^11 + 135*x^10 + 130*x^9 + 319*x^8 - 43*x^7 + 152*x^6 - 81*x^5 + 35*x^4 - 10*x^3 + 6*x^2 - 3*x + 1)*y^3
        + x^4*(x^9 - 2*x^8 + 3*x^7 - 4*x^6 + 5*x^5 + 60*x^4 + 19*x^3 + 73*x^2 - 6*x + 15)*y^2
        + 2*x^4*(6*x^2 + x + 3)*y
        + x^4;
r:=(x^2*y + x*y + y + 1)/(x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y + y + 1)/(x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
